name: or-court-docs
description: Draft and format pleadings, declarations, motions, notes for hearing, and proposed orders for Oregon circuit courts. Applies UTCR 2.010 statewide formatting; includes Multnomah County Circuit Court (Portland) and Washington County Circuit Court (Hillsboro) specifics plus a county-court roll-up for the other most-populous counties (Clackamas, Lane, Marion, Jackson, Deschutes, Linn, Benton, Yamhill, Polk, Douglas); supports pro se workflows. Architected as matter-neutral civil-procedure skills (ORCP civil rules, OEC evidence rules, ORS 20 fees and costs, local SLR rules, citation format per the Oregon Appellate Courts Style Manual, online sources, discovery, first-30-days response, hearings, filing packets, post-judgment, fact-checking, deadlines under ORCP 10 + ORS 187.010 holidays) plus subject-matter bundles that plug into the procedural skills. The first subject-matter bundle, or-consumer-debt, covers FDCPA, Reg F, ORS 697 (Collection Agency Registration), the Oregon Unlawful Trade Practices Act (UTPA, ORS 646.605 et seq.), chain-of-title doctrine, fact-pattern triage, and synthetic example filings for debt-buyer defense. The architecture leaves clean slots for future bundles (landlord-tenant under ORS 90, family, personal injury, etc.). All workflows are skills (no slash commands) so the agent invokes them automatically from natural-language requests.
